name: Meat-ze-Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ground beef with evaporated milk, bread crumbs, and garlic powder.
2. Press the mixture into a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Spread tomato paste over the meat layer.
4. (Optional) Place pepperoni on top of the tomato paste.
5. Top with shredded cheddar cheese (or mozzarella), oregano, and grated Parmesan cheese.
6. Bake at 375°F for about 25 minutes.
